# Hofuf Formation

**Summary**: A Late Miocene to Early Pliocene sedimentary formation in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-yousif|Yousif, 2013]] studied the hofuf-formation to determine its depositional environment and reservoir characteristics.

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] investigated the Hofuf Formation to analyze its fracture systems and impact on reservoir quality.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2013-yousif|Yousif, 2013]] meandering stream

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] investigated the Hofuf Formation to analyze its fracture systems and impact on reservoir quality.

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation shows a fluvial depositional environment, specifically within a meandering stream system. ([[2013-yousif|Yousif, 2013, p. 66]])

- The formation contains a complex network of fractures with a primary WNW-ESE orientation. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 51]])
